label: Solar Panel Array
description: These panels generate 120kW of clean energy, offsetting 85 tonnes of CO2 per year.
funFact: On a clear day, this array produces enough electricity to charge over 400 smartphones.
hours: Generates power from sunrise to sunset — no downtime required.

label: Recycling Center
description: Campus diverts 60% of waste from landfill through this facility.
funFact: Recycling one aluminum can saves enough energy to run a TV for 3 hours.

label: EV Charging Station
description: 8 charging bays powered by 100% renewable energy.
funFact: Each full charge here avoids roughly 4kg of CO2 compared to a gas fill-up.
hours: Open 24/7 — all 8 bays available at any time.

label: Campus Garden
description: Student-run garden producing 200kg of organic food each semester.
funFact: All food grown here is donated to the campus food pantry — zero waste.
hours: Open daily dawn to dusk. Volunteer Sundays 10am–12pm.
